revision.text: <!-- ONLY add names that are recognised by the #switch in {{Script}}. List as of 20 Feb 2021: -->{{#switch:{{{input1|}}} |Arabic = Arab |Fraser = Lisu |Greek = Grek |Hebrew = Hebr |Hanunoo = Hano |Limbu = Limb |Meithei = Mtei |Nastaliq = Aran |Nko = Nkoo |Phoenician = Phnx |Pollard = Plrd |Vai = Vaii |Yezidi = Yezi |Yi = Yiii |#default = {{{input1|}}} }} <noinclude>{{pp-30-500|small=yes}}</noinclude>

<!-- ONLY add names that are recognised by the #switch in {{Script}}. List as of 20 Feb 2021: -->{{#switch:{{{input1|}}} |Arabic = Arab |Fraser = Lisu |Greek = Grek |Hebrew = Hebr |Hanunoo = Hano |Limbu = Limb |Meithei = Mtei |Nastaliq = Aran |Nko = Nkoo |Phoenician = Phnx |Pollard = Plrd |Vai = Vaii |Yezidi = Yezi |Yi = Yiii |#default = {{{input1|}}} }} <noinclude>{{pp-30-500|small=yes}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- ONLY add names that are recognised by the #switch in {{Script}}.
